evals.name: happy-path-no-previous
evals.description: Single month analysis with no previous month data
evals.setup: mkdir -p trxns analysis && cp evals/files/sample-2026-03.csv trxns/2026-03.csv
expectations: Output file created at analysis/2026-03.md
Credit row (PAYMENT THANK YOU) is excluded from analysis
Total transactions count is 14 (15 rows minus 1 credit)
At least 5 categories are represented in the spend breakdown
Food & Drinks is sub-categorized into Essential and Social
MoM section states no previous month data available
Savings recommendations reference actual merchant names
Summary presented to user after file is written

evals.name: happy-path-with-mom
evals.description: Analysis with previous month comparison available
evals.setup: mkdir -p trxns analysis && cp evals/files/sample-2026-03.csv trxns/2026-03.csv && cp evals/files/sample-analysis-2026-02.md analysis/2026-02.md
expectations: Output file created at analysis/2026-03.md
MoM comparison section is populated with deltas
Shopping category shows notable increase (Tokopedia Rp 890k + Shopee Rp 450k vs prev Rp 320k)
Percentage changes are calculated for each category
Trend indicators are used (increase/decrease/stable)
Savings recommendations reference MoM changes

evals.name: edge-all-credit
evals.description: CSV where all rows are credit type
evals.setup:
mkdir -p trxns analysis && printf 'card_last4,transaction_date,posting_date,description,amount,type,installment_info
1234,2026-04-01,2026-04-02,PAYMENT THANK YOU,500000,credit,
5678,2026-04-05,2026-04-06,PAYMENT THANK YOU,300000,credit,
' > trxns/2026-04.csv
expectations: No output file is created at analysis/2026-04.md
User is informed that no spending transactions were found

evals.name: edge-empty-csv
expectations: No output file is created at analysis/2026-05.md
User is informed that no transactions were found

evals.name: edge-file-not-found
expectations: User is informed the CSV file was not found
Expected path trxns/2026-06.csv is mentioned in the error message
No output file is created

evals.name: edge-january-boundary
evals.description: January analysis should look for December of previous year for MoM
evals.setup: mkdir -p trxns analysis && cp evals/files/sample-2026-02.csv trxns/2026-01.csv
expectations: Skill correctly computes previous month as 2025-12
Glob checks for analysis/2025-12.md (not analysis/2026-00.md)
MoM section gracefully handles missing 2025-12 analysis

evals.name: suspicious-category-flag
evals.setup:
mkdir -p trxns analysis && printf 'card_last4,transaction_date,posting_date,description,amount,type,installment_info
1234,2026-07-01,2026-07-02,Retail IDN Tokopedia,900000,debit,
1234,2026-07-05,2026-07-06,Retail IDN Shopee,800000,debit,
5678,2026-07-10,2026-07-11,STARBUCKS COFFEE,50000,debit,
5678,2026-07-15,2026-07-16,PLN LISTRIK,350000,debit,
' > trxns/2026-07.csv
expectations: Shopping category is flagged as disproportionately high (>40% of Rp 2.1M total)
Flag indicator appears in the Spend by Category table
Savings recommendations specifically address the high Shopping spend

evals.name: multiple-cards
evals.description: Verify all 3 card numbers are listed in header
evals.setup: mkdir -p trxns analysis && cp evals/files/sample-2026-03.csv trxns/2026-03.csv
expectations: Header metadata lists all 3 cards: 1234, 5678, 9012
Transaction details show correct card_last4 for each entry
